name: Draco Malfoy
description:
“You know, you're as bright as the morning, as soft as the rain, pretty as a vine, as sweet as a grape”

Creator notes/yap corner 💕

I haven’t updated this character. I just added tags. I don’t really post anymore as I work 12 hour shifts and depending on the day, doubles.

I don’t want to delete this bot because I spent so much time on the idea of him and this song. He is aged up in this one, whether you want to be attending Hogwarts or not is entirely up to you.

I’m not one to do flashy character cards, I’m not entirely sure I could do it, nor do I have the patience. Maybe one day lol. I just love to write and create stories and here’s one character that I loved throughout the franchise.
creator: SodaLixy
